Episodes.Title: Robot: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: Can the Doctor, now in his fourth incarnation, recover from his post-regenerative trauma to save the Earth from Think Tank and their plot for world domination?

Episodes.Title: Robot: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Terrance Dicks, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Sarah become convinced Think Tank are behind the electronic component thefts but are unable to stop them carrying out another raid.

Episodes.Title: Robot: Part Three
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: Sarah and Kettlewell infiltrate an SRS meeting to try and find out what Miss Winters is up to but there is a surprise in store.

Episodes.Title: Robot: Part Four
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: UNIT attempt to get into the bunker to stop Miss Winters setting off the world's nuclear missiles but first they have to get past the K1.

Episodes.Title: The Ark in Space: Part One
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor's attempt to give Harry a trip in the TARDIS sees the two of them and Sarah arriving onboard a space station in the far future, with some rather deadly security mechanisms.

Episodes.Title: The Ark in Space: Part Two
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Harry revive the Ark's medtech, Vira, to help Sarah.But when station commander Noah is revived, he becomes suspicious of the newcomers.

Episodes.Title: The Ark in Space: Part Three
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: Knowing that Noah has been infected by the Wirrn, the Doctor persuades Vira to halt the reviving of her people, knowing it will place them in danger as well.

Episodes.Title: The Ark in Space: Part Four
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor tries to protect the humans still in cryogenic suspension from the Wirrn, who are determined to use Earth as their new breeding ground.

Episodes.Title: The Sontaran Experiment: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry teleports to Earth to ensure the planet is safe for the survivors on-board Nerva Beacon to return to Earth and re-inhabit their world. Only to find a Sontaran named Styre has captured a group of humans ...

Episodes.Title: The Sontaran Experiment: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Bob Baker, Dave Martin, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor learns that Styre has been experimenting on the Galsec crewmembers to pave the way for a Sontaran invasion of Earth and decides the only way to halt his plans is to challenge him to a duel.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his companions are sent to the planet Skaro by the Time Lords to prevent the creation of the Daleks.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part Two
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Harry are taken to the Kaled bunker where Davros is preparing to demonstrate the Daleks, while Sarah is captured by the Thals and taken to their city as a slave worker.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part Three
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Harry head to the Kaled city to alert the authorities to Davros' plans while Sarah and Sevrin are forced to work on the completion of the Thals' rocket.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part Four
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor fails to prevent the Thals from destroying the Kaled city but they don't have long to enjoy their victory before the Daleks attack.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part Five
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor is forced to give Davros full details of future Dalek victories but opposition to Davros' plans is growing among the Kaleds and soon there is open rebellion.

Episodes.Title: Genesis of the Daleks: Part Six
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: Gharman tries to convince the Kaleds to vote against the Dalek project but Davros has a trick up his sleeve, while the Doctor works to destroy the tape recording of Dalek victory and the Thals plan an intervention of their own.

Episodes.Title: Revenge of the Cybermen: Part One
Episodes.Writer: Gerry Davis, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry use the Time Ring to return to the Nerva Beacon, however they arrive thousands of years earlier than they anticipated and discover that an old foe of the Doctor is targeting the station's crew.

Episodes.Title: Revenge of the Cybermen: Part Two
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor transmits Sarah and Harry down to Voga to cure Sarah of the Cybermat's poison but Kellman's sabotage means he is unable to bring them back.

Episodes.Title: Revenge of the Cybermen: Part Three
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Cybermen force the Doctor, Stevenson and Lester to carry bombs to the centre of Voga while Sarah, Harry and Tyrum decide to contact Vorus.

Episodes.Title: Revenge of the Cybermen: Part Four
Episodes.Actors: Tom Baker, Elisabeth Sladen, Ian Marter
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Harry and Lester try to destroy the Cybermen's relay device, while the Vogans prepare to destroy Nerva even though Sarah is still on board.
